expectations.evidence: Valid JSON but does NOT match supplier-profiler output schema. Uses 'supplier{}' instead of 'ico'/'name', 'contracts.detail[]' instead of 'contracts[]', 'red_flags.flags[]' instead of 'flags[]'. No 'procurement' or 'rpvs' null fields.
red_flags.flags[0]: flag_type 'threshold_gaming', contract_id 11696268, detail '212,783.85 EUR (iba 2,216 EUR pod EU limitom 215K)'.
contracts.buyer_breakdown shows 3 contracts from Obec Liptovske Sliace. risk_assessment.key_concerns[4]: '3 of 4 contracts (74% of value) are with a single buyer'.
financial_data section has finstat_summary (revenue, profit, assets) and ruz_equity (vlastne_imanie, zakladne_imanie, vysledok_hospodarenia, celkove_pasiva). Also finstat_additional_table_values.
